positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic lunar guardian creature—a blend of celestial wildlife and geometric modern art. The creature, resembling a graceful snow leopard combined with cosmic nebula elements, is depicted mid-leap over a stylized mountain range under a luminous, crescent moon. Use clean silhouettes, high contrast, and limited color palette (deep indigo, metallic gold, milky white, and turquoise accents). The style should be a fusion of neo-tribal art, minimalist linework, and cosmic psychedelic art, making it highly impactful and scalable for apparel prints. Central composition, dramatic lighting emphasizing edges, and a cohesive visual flow.
